retry_reason: The put operations always succeed; the function does not fail, so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This function is a bulk put wrapper for a singly-linked list of sk_buff structures. It iterates over the list, calling kfree_skb_reason on each skb to drop a reference, while recording the appropriate drop reason (TC classifier or qdisc). The caller must ensure the list is valid and must not use any skb after this function returns, as all references are released. There is no return value; the operation always succeeds.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to release references on a list of sk_buff structures via kfree_skb_reason (a put operation). The only additional logic is determining the correct drop reason, which is integral to the release semantics and does not constitute significant unrelated business logic.
